text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sat Oct 31 16:32:32 UTC 2020
New revision: 553780
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/553780

Log:
  sysutils/sysctlinfo-kmod: fix after r366465

  - the new sysctl object {0.7} "sysctl.nextnoskip" overlaps this interface
  - add files/patch-sysctlinfo.h to change sysctl OIDs of this interface

  PR:		250148
  Submitted by:	Alfonso S. Siciliano <alfix86@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/sysctlinfo-kmod/Makefile
  head/sysutils/sysctlinfo-kmod/files/
  head/sysutils/sysctlinfo-kmod/files/patch-sysctlinfo.h
